title: Egotism
content:
Here's to the man who is wisest and best,
     Here's to the man who with judgment is blest.
     Here's to the man who's as smart as can be -
     I mean the man who agrees with me.
meaning:
"Egotism" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
